concerns.text: Knot Atlas Prime Knots... NO verified source found... Data downloaded via web scraping/API". The Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires every external citation to be verified. Relying on a primary data source with 'NO verified source found' status undermines the scientific validity and reproducibility of the entire analysis.

Establish measurement precision for crossing number and braid index". Crossing number and braid index are tabulated topological invariants, not experimental measurements. 'Measurement precision' is a category error; the analysis should validate 'data consistency' or 'algorithm correctness' (for computed invariants), not measurement precision for tabulated values.

System MUST validate hyperbolic volume data against KnotInfo reference values ( nodename nor servname provided, or not known)"))])". The reference URL is broken/corrupted, making the validation requirement untestable and the citation unverifiable.
